query.original: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?
query.used: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?

answer: No, according to the rules provided, you cannot cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features. The rules state that you can only take one action during your turn, and casting a spell or making a weapon attack both require an action.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is fully correct and relevant to the user query, accurately explaining that you cannot cast a spell and make a weapon attack in the same turn without special features. It aligns well with the reference answer.
